ddls:
CREATE TABLE "satellite_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite image */,
  "spectral_index" TEXT /* Type of spectral index calculated (e.g., Nbr) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the image was acquired */,
  "satellite" TEXT /* Satellite that captured the image */,
  "sensor" TEXT /* Sensor used to capture the image */,
  "ndvi_value" REAL /* Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI) value */,
  "valid_pixel_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of valid pixels in the image */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the image */,
  "cloud_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of cloud coverage in the image */,
  "acquisition_time" TEXT /* Time of day when the image was acquired */,
  "processing_level" TEXT /* Level of processing the image has undergone */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the stored image data */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image file in megabytes */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "quality_assessment" TEXT /* Summary of the image quality assessment */,
  "metadata_json" TEXT /* Additional metadata in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_images_sensor FOREIGN KEY ("sensor") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_images_satellite FOREIGN KEY ("satellite") REFERENCES satellites ("satellite_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_images_geographic_location FOREIGN KEY ("geographic_location") REFERENCES geographic_locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_images_spectral_index FOREIGN KEY ("spectral_index") REFERENCES spectral_indices ("index_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellites" (
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite */,
  "satellite_name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator or organization that owns the satellite */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the satellite was launched */,
  "orbit_type" TEXT /* Type of orbit (e.g., polar, geostationary) */,
  "sensor_ids" TEXT /* Array of sensor IDs associated with the satellite */,
  "mission_duration" TEXT /* Expected duration of the satellite mission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the satellite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., optical, radar) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Spatial resolution of the sensor */,
  "spectral_bands" TEXT /* Array of spectral bands supported by the sensor */,
  "operating_wavelengths" TEXT /* Array of wavelengths the sensor operates at */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectral_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectral index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the spectral index */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spectral index */,
  "applications" TEXT /* Array of applications or use cases for the spectral index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state within the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the satellite image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the access (e.g., research, monitoring) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES satellite_images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
